message:
deps(cass): bump asupersync 2028c111→e64a95a2 and frankensqlite 6d046a5f→aed640a2

Two pinned git-rev bumps, both coming from upstream work this session:

  * asupersync 2028c111 → e64a95a2
    Pulls in the RaptorQ encoded symbol parsing fuzz target and the
    other fuzz infrastructure added in the asupersync main-branch sync
    (see that repo's recent commit list).

  * frankensqlite 6d046a5f → aed640a2
    Picks up the BEGIN → SAVEPOINT → ROLLBACK SAVEPOINT → ROLLBACK
    transaction-isolation fix plus the `PRAGMA integrity_check` fixes
    referenced by the concurrent beads_rust work on issues #237/245/246/248.

Both bumps are fully additive upstream — no API deletions, no
behavior changes requested at call sites in cass. Cargo.lock will be
refreshed in a follow-up commit once a clean `cargo build` resolves
the transitive graph against the new revs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
